calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-29-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day for prove-up court trial having been continued from June 17, 2019.
Department 514; Judge: Gail Dekreon; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR#11185, adelgado@sftc.org, 415-551-5768.

Garet D. O'Keefe, Esq., appearing on behalf of Plaintiff Matthew Rabinowitz, also present.
No appearance on behalf of or by Defendant Alejandro Gonzalez.
Mr. Rabinowitz is sworn and examined.
The matter is continued to 2pm on 7-29-19. Plaintiff waives the court reporter for the afternoon session.
Parties re-convene for further short cause trial.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Matthew Rabinowitz and against Defendant Alejandro Gonzalez as follows:
Principal $275,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest $29,259.06
Attorney's Fees $21,760.00
Costs $1950.78
Incidental and consequential damages $200,000.00
Punitive damages $200,000.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $727,969.84
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-17-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-17-2019 Continued To Jul-29-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2018 Set For Trial On Jun-17-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
